name: Voice (STT/TTS)
description: Convert voice to text (STT) and text to voice (TTS) using MLX-Audio optimized for Apple Silicon. TTS uses Qwen3-TTS for voice cloning.
prompt: Voice skill for speech recognition and synthesis. Usage: {"action": "transcribe", "audio_path": "/path/to/audio.ogg"} or {"action": "speak", "text": "Hello world"} or {"action": "voices"} or {"action": "status"}

action.description: Action to perform: transcribe (STT), speak (TTS), voices (list available), status (check availability)

audio_path.description: Path to audio file for transcription. Supports .ogg, .wav, .mp3, .m4a formats. Required for 'transcribe' action.

text.description: Text to convert to speech. Required for 'speak' action.

voice.description: Voice to use for TTS. For Qwen3-TTS, use 'default' for the built-in reference voice. Use 'voices' action to see available reference audio files.

ref_audio.description: Path to reference audio file for voice cloning (Qwen3-TTS only). Optional - uses default reference if not provided.

ref_text.description: Text corresponding to the reference audio (Qwen3-TTS only). Required if ref_audio is provided.

data.ref_audio: reference audio used for cloning (if Qwen3)

voices: list of available voices or reference audio files

TTS_MODEL.description: MLX TTS model for text-to-speech. Qwen3-TTS uses voice cloning.

TTS_VOICE.description: Default voice for TTS. For Qwen3-TTS, use 'default'.

TTS_LANG_CODE.description: Language code for TTS: 'en' for English, 'zh' for Chinese

TTS_REF_AUDIO.description: Reference audio file for Qwen3-TTS voice cloning

TTS_REF_TEXT.default: 是呀，他还想换个地球仪哈哈哈，看来给你积累了一些快乐值了，你还想不想再听一个其他的笑话呀？
TTS_REF_TEXT.description: Reference text corresponding to the reference audio

OUTPUT_TTS_PATH.description: Output directory for TTS audio files

examples.description: Convert text to speech with default voice cloning
Convert text to speech with custom reference audio

params.ref_text: 这是参考音频的文本内容
